text.title: Team Development Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (team size, retro corpus depth, conflict signal, throughput shape) to an action — each leaf references a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — no team to develop; pivot to solo-PM kit
run Forming workshop first: charter draft + co-author session; defer retro-synth until ≥2 sprints collected

branch.question: conflict_signal == true (≥ 2 retros cite role overlap or review conflict)?

conclusion.verdict: Storming diagnosis with confidence ≥ 0.7; mediation-first PM action; no delegation
treat as theme requiring ≥ 2-sprint evidence; do not call Storming until throughput confirms
emit gap_options_evaluated of length 4; reject hire-first proposals; pair owner_role + deadline_sprint
Performing / Norming; PM action = retro-synth + owner+deadline on every action; rotate facilitator

text.example: team_size=5 → retro_corpus=3 → conflict_signal=true (3 retros) → throughput_drop=28% → Storming, confidence ≥ 0.7, mediation-first.
